name: com.jinhosung96.scene-navigator-for-unity
description: Multi-scene management framework for Unity. Classifies scenes into Base / Main / Sub / Instance, provides type-based async transition API (Transition / Back / Reload / Load / Unload), Main transition history, R3-based lifecycle events, and pluggable transition effects.

samples.description: Two Mains + a shared Sub + an Instance scene. Smallest end-to-end demo.
